message:
chore: add daemon log pattern to .beads/.gitignore, create .ubsignore

- Add daemon-*.log.gz pattern to ignore compressed timestamped logs
- Create .ubsignore to exclude non-code files from UBS scanning

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -17,3 +17,6 @@ bd.db
 # Keep JSONL exports and config (source of truth for git)
 !*.jsonl
 !config.json
+
+# Compressed daemon logs (timestamped)
+daemon-*.log.gz

@@ -0,0 +1,17 @@
+# Build artifacts (not code)
+/target
+*.rs.bk
+
+# Databases and logs (not code)
+*.db
+*.db-*
+*.log
+*.log.gz
+.beads/daemon-*.log.gz
+
+# Generated/vendor files (not code to scan)
+vendor/
+toolchains/
+
+# Binary outputs
+*.png
